channel.title: arXiv · 气象 × AI 精选论文
channel.description: 每日10:00自动更新 · 气象与AI交叉最新论文与要点

item.title: Causal Foundation Models with Continuous Treatments
item.description:
Authors: Christopher Stith, Medha Barath, Vahid Balazadeh, Jesse C. Cresswell, Rahul G. Krishnan

Causal inference, estimating causal effects from observational data, is a fundamental tool in many disciplines. Of particular importance across a variety of domains is the continuous treatment setting, where the variable of intervention has a continuous range. This setting is far less explored and represents a substantial shift from the binary treatment setting, with models needing to represent effects across a continuum of treatment values

要点：
- 方法：采用机器学习/深度学习模型。

item.title: Training ML Models with Predictable Failures
item.description:
Authors: Will Schwarzer, Scott Niekum

Estimating how often an ML model will fail at deployment scale is central to pre-deployment safety assessment, but a feasible evaluation set is rarely large enough to observe the failures that matter. Jones et al. (2025) address this by extrapolating from the largest k failure scores in an evaluation set to predict deployment-scale failure rates

要点：
- 方法：采用机器学习/深度学习模型。
- 任务：降尺度/预报/临近预测等应用场景。

item.title: FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents
item.description:
Authors: Shashwat Goel, Nikhil Chandak, Arvindh Arun, Ameya Prabhu, Steffen Staab, Moritz Hardt, Maksym Andriushchenko, Jonas Geiping

AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We build FutureSim, where agents forecast world events beyond their knowledge cutoff while interacting with a chronological replay of the world: real news articles arriving and questions resolving over the simulated period

要点：
- 任务：降尺度/预报/临近预测等应用场景。
